<?php namespace Faker\Provider\en_GB; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { protected static $freeEmailDomain = ['gmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'hotmail.com', 'gmail.co.uk', 'yahoo.co.uk', 'hotmail.co.uk']; protected static $tld = ['com', 'com', 'com', 'com', 'com', 'com', 'biz', 'info', 'net', 'org', 'co.uk']; }
